mitigations.mitigation_name: Apply egress controls on the FortiGate to allow only required outbound web traffic from the Ubuntu host and block arbitrary direct-to-internet HTTPS exfiltration, while preserving the agent's validation connectivity

args.command:
config firewall address
    edit "UbuntuComputer"
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall addrgrp
    edit "ALLOW_WEB_EXCEPT_EXFIL"
        set member "all"
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_WEB"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set action accept
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Allow required outbound web traffic from UbuntuComputer"
    next
    edit 0
        set name "UBUNTU_DENY_OTHER_OUTBOUND"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set action deny
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Block arbitrary outbound traffic from UbuntuComputer"
    next
end

config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set status disable
    next
    edit 3
        set status disable
    next
    edit 4
        set name "UBUNTU_ALLOW_WEB"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set action accept
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Allow required outbound web traffic from UbuntuComputer"
    next
    edit 5
        set name "UBUNTU_DENY_OTHER_OUTBOUND"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set action deny
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Block arbitrary outbound traffic from UbuntuComputer"
    next
    move 4 before 100
    move 5 after 4
end
show firewall policy
